content.text:
[cron:919eddd9-5ee9-40b2-a29e-3b9a14aa3c92 img-gen-1-queue-check] CHECK_IMG_QUEUE: Check the image generation queue and process any pending requests. Run: node /data/img-gen/img-claim.js img-gen-1 — if a request is returned (not null), process it following your SOUL.md workflow. Generate the image in Gemini, download it, call img-complete.js when done, then check the queue again for more pending requests.
Current time: Friday, March 13th, 2026 — 8:23 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
